overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat exploring a forest camp at night. The character walks through pine trees, approaches an NPC by a cart, enters a covered shelter, and explores the campsite with tents and lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail at night

events.description: exiting dense forest trees into cleared camp area with visible lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the lit campsite ahead

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow dirt trail covered with fallen leaves
large boulders and rocks among the trees
wooden building with lit windows visible through the trees
canvas tent visible in the distance at the camp entrance
hanging lantern providing warm light in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense pine forest at night along a narrow dirt trail. Tall trees line both sides with stone formations visible on the right, while the warm glow of camp lanterns and a canvas tent appear in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest camp entrance with wooden carts and stone walls

events.description: character slows and approaches NPC sitting near wooden cart

agents.ego_description: approaching an NPC sitting by a cart and examining the camp surroundings

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the ground next to a wooden cart, appears to be resting

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the dirt ground
stone wall forming the boundary of the camp area
dark entrance to a covered wooden shelter ahead
wooden barrel next to the cart

segments.scene_description: The character enters the open campsite and approaches an NPC sitting by a wooden cart. A stone wall runs along the left side while a dark entrance to a covered structure looms ahead, with canvas tents now visible closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shelter with wooden beds and campfire

events.description: character enters covered wooden structure with canvas roofing
interior is dimly lit by warm campfire and hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered shelter examining the beds and interior layout

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near the far exit of the shelter, facing toward the character

entered.detail: thick wooden posts supporting the roof structure
canvas fabric stretched overhead as a roof
simple wooden bed frame with mattress against the wall
burning campfire providing heat and light inside the shelter
stack of chopped firewood near the wall
open doorway leading back outside to the camp

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered shelter supported by wooden beams with a canvas roof overhead. Inside are wooden beds, a burning campfire, and a pile of firewood, while another NPC stands near the far exit. The space is dimly illuminated by the warm firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: active campsite with multiple tents and campfires

events.description: character exits covered structure back into open camp area with tents
character turns left and walks past seated NPCs near campfire

agents.ego_description: walking around the campsite examining tents and passing NPCs sitting near fires

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the ground near a campfire to the left of the path

entered.detail: large A-frame canvas tent with open flaps and lantern hanging
burning campfire with stones arranged around it
wooden barrel standing upright near the large tent
tall pine trees visible in the background beyond the camp

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shelter and explores the active campsite, passing a large canvas tent with a hanging lantern. NPCs sit near campfires scattered throughout the clearing, with tall pine trees visible in the background against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dark pine forest into the warm, flickering light of an active woodland campsite. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall trees and stone formations, moving toward the distant glow of lanterns and canvas tents. As the character enters the open clearing, the camera passes a stone wall and an NPC by a wooden cart before shifting into the dim interior of a covered shelter supported by wooden beams. Inside, the environment is bathed in the orange light of a burning campfire and wooden beds, before the camera follows the character back outside into the night air. The scene finally expands across the campsite, passing hanging lanterns and NPCs gathered around scattered fires with the dense forest looming in the background.
